definition:
πολιτεία, -ας, ἡ
 (πολιτεύω), [in LXX: 2Ma.4:11 2Mac 6:23 2Mac 8:17 2Mac 13:14, 3Ma.3:21 3Mac 3:23, 4Ma.3:20 4Mac 8:7 4Mac 17:9 * ;] 
  1. citizenship: Act.22:28 (3 Mac, ll. with, Hdt., Xen., a1.). 
   2. government, administration (Aristoph., Dem., al.). 
   3. a commonwealth: Eph.2:12.†
 (AS)
